# Vendor assets

Third-party and bundled assets that are not part of the TypeScript monorepo.

| Path | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `ftc-live-assets/` | Cached copy of FTC Live public assets (audio, CSS, logos, video). Regenerated by `scripts/copy-ftc-assets.ps1`. |
| `ftc-cloud-bundle/` | Small FTC cloud bundle snippets used during integration. |
| `scorekeeper/` | Notes / upstream pointer for [FIRST Scorekeeper](https://github.com/FIRST-Tech-Challenge/scorekeeper). |
| `installers/` | **Gitignored** — local FTC Live installer zips and offline HTML (too large for Git). |

The web app serves assets from `apps/web/public/ftc-live/`. After cloning, run:

```powershell
.\scripts\copy-ftc-assets.ps1
```

…if match audio/video is missing (requires FTC Live 2026 installed once locally).
